compiled_state.title: sprint: implementation-plan plan review (Step 4) used generic agent instead of reviewer sub-agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: During /dso:sprint → /dso:implementation-plan Step 4 for story ce63-4a2a, the Stage 2 plan review dispatched a generic general-purpose sub-agent (model: sonnet) with an ad-hoc multi-perspective rubric prompt instead of following the REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md. The reviewer files at plugins/dso/docs/reviewers/plan/{task-design,tdd,safety,dependencies,completeness}.md were found to be missing (ls returned nothing), but the correct fallback per the workflow is to surface that error, not to write an inline prompt approximating the review. The plan review step should fail loudly when reviewer files are absent rather than substituting a generic agent.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix applied: implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 4 (line 792) — reviewer file paths anchored with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/implementation-plan/ prefix (eliminates ambiguous relative path resolution). HALT directive added after perspectives list: orchestrator must halt if any reviewer file cannot be read, not synthesize inline rubric. Diagnosis: Failure Mode 13 (Phantom Capability Hallucination) — bare paths resolved against non-existent plugins/dso/docs/reviewers/plan/.
comments.author: Test
